\tzpentry{ID5533}{Emergent Curvature Equatorial Dynamics Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5533 introduces Emergent Curvature Equatorial Dynamics Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi_n(y) = e^{-\beta y^2/(2c)} \,H_n\!\left(\sqrt{\frac{\beta}{c}}\,y\right), \end{equation}
